name: 8p23_3_subtelomeric_SD
description: 8p subtelomeric region (8p23.3) containing FBXO25, ERICH1 and subtelomeric SD families shared with other chromosome ends. Recurrent 8p23 terminal deletions documented in unbalanced translocations.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric WASH-family and FAM86 paralogs shared across chromosome ends; substrate for telomere-capture rearrangements.
